name: Billingham 35 RUCKSACK
description: The stylish and versatile 35 Rucksack from Billingham is made from sage FibreNyte with chocolate leather trim. The main compartment has a 7L capacity to accommodate your camera gear or everyday items, with a double-zippered opening for quick access.

features.Key Features:: Full-Grain, Vegetable-Tanned Leather | Double Zipper Opening | Removable Padded Insert | Horizontal Flap Divider | 2 Vertical Dividers | Interior Pocket Behind Front Flap | Front Pocket | Ergonomic Shoulder Straps | Solid Brass Fixings | Hanging Loop
features.What’s in the box?: Billingham 35 Rucksack (Sage FibreNyte / Chocolate Leather Trim, 7L) | Padded Insert | 3 x Dividers | Limited 5-Year Manufacturer Warranty
